assumptions: The question concerns hedge accounting under IFRS 9 in consolidated financial statements.
The intragroup dividend has been declared and recognized as an intragroup receivable.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies fair value hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for exposures to changes in fair value of recognised assets or liabilities attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies cash flow hedge as a top-level hedge accounting model for exposure to variability in cash flows attributable to a particular risk.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedge of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct top-level hedge accounting model for foreign currency risk in consolidated financial statements.
